title: eragrostis lateritica
intro: Eragrostis lateritica, also known as Red Rice Grass, is a type of perennial grass native to tropical regions. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to combat fever and infections. The health benefits of Eragrostis lateritica include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Eragrostis lateritica may be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
